<@393585313618067456> poking you again for some advice!
- I got Tawil to E2 now (2 copies after 75 summons!). Should i get her to E3?
- Should I get her wheel and what enlightment?
- Should I use my awakener and wheel dupe? For example, I have Castor wheel e0, Clem wheel e2.

As Animus, said, you could go Tawil/Hameln/Ryker/Caecus, which is Aequor Tawil. You could go Tentacle Discard which is Corposant/Tulu/Caecus/Miryam. Another team is Jenkin/Erica/Ogier/Ramona. For the Corposant and Jenkin team, you could mix Caro and add Thais, and if you need one more then Faint or Aigis.

Caecus can run multiple different setups. You can run Keyflare Regen to generate more Posses. You can run Aliemus Regen, so that he can Exalt more often, stacking more Tentacle Damage(and Counter), while applying Vulnerable(50% Dmg Amp) during burst turns. His Exalt makes it so counter procs twice, but that doesn’t matter unless your running a Counter Comp. You can give him WoDs(Wheels) that increase the Counter he generates which once again, is for counter comps. Lastly, you could give him any WoD that says “Increase Shield”, so that he shields more from his “Defend” and 3 Cost.
For Caro, you can run Uvhash/Aigis/Thais/Faint. For Ultra, you can run Castor/Jenkin/Winkle/Ogier.

Why is the Fluffball, here? <:question2:1356053130336272414> <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057> Go ask Aurora/Monchi/Hitsu/Frost/Flares/Blecnes, you ball of Fluff <:goodjob2:1356053078738206840> <:point:1356053112292511815>

<:dead:1356082627509092372> You’re not the first…… But seriously, click on Awakeners and look at all the different tabs of information<:takenotes:1357186646294138890> It will help alot with understanding every Awakeners functions/scalings/passives. Ok? <:goodjob2:1356053078738206840>
Ogier, yes. Other Caro teams, no.
What are your choices(I don’t know them, but maybe someone else knows)?
It does not.

1. Tawil is greedy so she wants all Enlightenments and OE, if you can. The downside is obviously not being able to invest in anyone else. I would say E2 is a good stopping point, but pushing her further is fine.
2. Tawil Wheel is really nice for her, as it’s synergies with her kit, and is a amazing wheel overall. Reason is that its a +2 Hand Size wheel. Any WoDs that gives handsize is very valuable. Furthermore, the wheel allows 300% Keyflare Capacity which works with well with how her “Wings” can be played using Keyflare. Getting 4 copies(Base +3) would be ideal, but just grabbing one is solid still.
3. The last question doesn’t have a right or wrong answer. You can use them on whoever and whenever. I think the most important question is “What does this provide?”, and “Does this enable you to beat a harder stage now that you have it?”. There are also QoL Enlightenments, but *eh~*.
Brain full of fluff. Not enough power for dtide
But for Arc 2, ask those people. They will know much more~
Always worth. Most value with the paid pass, and the chapter packs. <:goodjob:1400771550097051669>
12 day player here, appealed by Tawils design but scared to pull on anyone. Is she any good or am I missing like, key characters to make her work or smth

Tawil can be run in any Aequor team, so as long as you have a Aequor Awakener, you’re fine. Most important Aequor Awakener for Tawil is Caecus. The only downside is that Tawil really wants E1, and E2 would be perfect. E3 is nice crit rate and crit dmg amp, which is amazing. OE is only necessary for Mono Tawil, but OE is still amazing in general. Greedy little god~ <:goodjob2:1356053078738206840>

Same Rheotoric. Stack as much Embryos and keep bursting over and over. Without Thais, you want Leigh or/and Aggripa to keep generating Embryos. You can mix Sorel with Aequor for a bigger Red Stance Tentacles into Exalt Burst turn. Mixing with Aequor will also give you access to White Tentacle Stances, which will help with surviving. The downside of mixing is Less Crimsum Furnace gain.

<@254395599841918976> 
Are there better comps/Awakeners, yes. Are these the best comps with what you currently have, maybe? Will these comps work for D-Tide, yes.

Tip for lower Alert D-Tide:
Relics are really strong and can carry you if you play into them. If you gather a bunch of Counter/Poison relics, they can carry any of  your teams despite your Awakeners not synergising with the Archetype.

Relics that further inforce your Archetype/Mechanic/Realm/Awakeners will also help of course.
I.E: Strength Stacking

Trying to get my feet wet with clearing all 5 zones, but I'm so used to using my main lineup (Caecus/Goliath/Nautila/Karen, now Tawil), that I got overwhelmed with having to build and learn to play 4 more teams.
Take your time imo. It's a 2 weeks cycle game mode. You have a lot of time to to enjoy it.

I would say take it one team at a time(like Aileen, said). Understand how the function and work together. Do the reading, and you’ll understand why these Awakeners work together, and how to form a burst turn, and survive.
